repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.model-serving: vLLM/Triton inference server, dynamic batching with queue timeout, p99 inference latency vs throughput, GPU utilization, model versioning rollout, and autoscaling on bursty load
write a cron job that emails a weekly CSV summary

retrieval_query: model serving inference server dynamic batching triton vllm model versioning inference latency throughput gpu utilization autoscaling cold start quantization tensorrt p99

validation_smoke.name: code.model-serving L3 validation smoke
signals: p99 latency measured under realistic concurrent load
GPU utilization high without queue starvation
batch size and timeout tuned against the latency SLO
new model version passes health check before receiving traffic
rollback to the previous version verified

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.model-serving diagnosis smoke
signals: GPU idle while requests queue (no batching)
p99 latency spikes from an oversized batch window
OOM at peak concurrency from unbounded batch
a bad model version served with no rollback path
cold start adds seconds on every scale-up
